summary: Pybind attr arguments passed through EXEC_NPU_CMD must be lvalue variables. Convert the scaling factor to a local float before calling the macro instead of passing a temporary cast expression.

If a fused kernel reads back intermediate results from global memory in the same pass and the output collapses to constants, keep the per-position channel logits in a local buffer, compute softmax from that buffer, and write the final values only once.

When a float attr propagated through tiling behaves like zero at runtime but compilation succeeds, validate the attr path first; for fixed-reference fused ops, pinning the known constant in the kernel can recover correctness and isolate the attr transport issue.
